label: pilot agent run (March 2026) -- pre per-item architecture; design-rationale evidence only
sourceRun: pilot mutation-agent run, March 2026 (predates the agentic-stryker per-item loop)
agentGitShaNote: not recorded -- the pilot predates run provenance capture; it also predates the per-item loop, exploreAPI, code search, runTests, verdicts, and harness-enforced mutation scopes

conditionFlags.toolSurface: filesystem MCP + Stryker MCP only (strykerMutationTest, strykerMutantDetails)
conditionFlags.strykerCallLimit: at most 2 successful strykerMutationTest calls, enforced at prompt level only

libraryNotes.note: 8 of 21 libraries produced no passing generated tests; see the thesis pilot appendix for the failure categorisation (6 exploration failures, 1 mutation-feedback timeout, 1 harness test-discovery mismatch)

provenance.note: Manifest added 2026-07-12. This run backs ONLY the pilot appendix tables (A.1-A.3) and the Design Rationale chapter; it is historical design evidence, not a controlled experimental condition.
